scripts.test-pages: sh -c 'PORT=${TEST_PAGES_PORT:-8787}; PID_FILE=/tmp/rpa-test-pages.pid; LOG_FILE=/tmp/rpa-test-pages.log; if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ] && kill -0 $(cat "$PID_FILE") 2>/dev/null; then echo "[test-pages] already running pid=$(cat "$PID_FILE")"; exit 0; fi; EXIST=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN -t 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$EXIST" ]; then echo "$EXIST" > "$PID_FILE"; echo "[test-pages] already running on port $PORT pid=$EXIST"; exit 0; fi; nohup env TEST_PAGES_PORT=$PORT node ./test/serve-test-pages.mjs >"$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > "$PID_FILE"; sleep 1; if kill -0 $(cat "$PID_FILE") 2>/dev/null; then echo "[test-pages] started pid=$(cat "$PID_FILE") url=http://127.0.0.1:$PORT"; else echo "[test-pages] failed, check $LOG_FILE"; exit 1; fi'
scripts.test-pages:stop: sh -c 'PID_FILE=/tmp/rpa-test-pages.pid; if [ ! -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then echo "[test-pages] not running (no pid file)"; exit 0; fi; PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE"); if kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; if kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then kill -9 "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; echo "[test-pages] stopped pid=$PID"; else echo "[test-pages] stale pid file: $PID"; fi; rm -f "$PID_FILE"'
scripts.test-pages:status: sh -c 'PID_FILE=/tmp/rpa-test-pages.pid; if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ] && kill -0 $(cat "$PID_FILE") 2>/dev/null; then echo "[test-pages] running pid=$(cat "$PID_FILE")"; else echo "[test-pages] not running"; fi'
